title: Separated Public Docs Viewer Route Registry From Local Manage Surface
summary: Split public Jekyll Docs Viewer routes onto a public-only route registry and excluded local manage-only Docs Viewer modules, HTML import modules, management CSS, and the full local route registry from public Jekyll output.
effect: Public /library/ and /analysis/ builds no longer publish or load the local /docs/ management route, graph placeholder hosted view, management shell assets, or import/write modules, while the standalone Docs Viewer service keeps the manage-capable route registry and management assets for local use.
verification: grep audit of public build output found no management route, management mount, graph hosted view, management CSS, or management JS
